basic_details.job_title: MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad)
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 16-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow: As per the ANRF guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in Electronics Engineering or allied relevant branches and GATE qualified. OR B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and GATE qualified.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow M.E./M.Tech. in Electronics Engineering or allied relevant branches and GATE qualified. B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and GATE qualified. Experience in the area of RF and Microwave Engineering and related field is preferable.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000 + HRA @ 20% per month for 1 year and Rs. 42,000 + HRA @ 20% per month for 1 year
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000 + HRA @ 20% per month for 1 year Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 42,000 + HRA @ 20% per month for 1 year

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MNNIT Allahabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow post at MNNIT Allahabad is 16 July 2026. Candidates must submit their applications via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow post in the MNNIT Allahabad recruitment drive. Interested candidates should apply promptly.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Junior Research Fellow position at MNNIT Allahabad is Email. Candidates need to send their duly completed application and supporting documents to the specified email ID.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Junior Research Fellow post at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow post is Rs. 37,000 + HRA @ 20% per month for the first year, and Rs. 42,000 + HRA @ 20% per month for the second year.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.E./M.Tech. in Electronics Engineering or allied branches with GATE qualification, OR a B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering with GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the job location for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow position is Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, specifically at Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MNNIT Allahabad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project needs, followed by an interview. Candidates will be informed about the interview details after shortlisting.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment at MNNIT Allahabad. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for applying to the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is as per the ANRF guidelines. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for detailed age-related information.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is the Junior Research Fellow position at MNNIT Allahabad?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at MNNIT Allahabad is a Project-based job. It is a contract position for a specific research project.
